evidence_required: visual render or source-extracted evidence for each component
minimal_success: Patch intake declares zero ocr_constant_uses or explains the blocker.
mission: Prevent any sign, exponent, summation domain or constant from being fixed from OCR-only text.
reject_if: render/visual check absent for a sign or exponent
target_shape: formula_component -> evidence_kind; OCR-only components must remain blockers
